## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| CinePlete version | (shown in sidebar, e.g. `v4.0.0`) |
| Install method | Docker / Proxmox LXC / Bare metal |
| Media server | Plex / Jellyfin / Emby |
| Media server version | (e.g. `Plex 1.40`, `Jellyfin 10.9`) |
| Browser | (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126) |
| OS / Platform | (e.g. Unraid 6.12, TrueNAS, Ubuntu 22.04) |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

Paste the relevant lines from the **Logs tab** (Config → Logs) or from `docker logs cineplete`.

paste logs here
